markdownRemark.html:
Awesome Vapor

Vapor is currently one of the most popular server-side Swift frameworks. It allows you to take the language you already know if you ever developed an iOS application and use it in a whole new way, to develop fast, scalable and reliable back-end systems that integrate easily with a wide range of third party services. This is a curated list of:

  • modern libraries that easily integrate with Vapor and follow Vapor’s philosophy of providing simple, clean yet powerful APIs;
  • well-written tutorials, books, videos and education materials;
  • tools to make your development process simpler and more enjoyable;
  • and more!

  • How to use
  • Libraries
  • Tools
  • Services
  • Education

How to use

Simply press Command + F to search for a keyword. If you’re only interested in entries related to Vapor 3 or only to Vapor 4, you may use the automatically generated filtered lists available on the filtered branch by visiting the links in this sentence. You may also find the legacy archived content in the legacy folder.

Libraries

  • API Error Middlewarestars27 – Vapor middleware for converting thrown errors to JSON responses.
  • APNSstars60 – Vapor APNS for iOS.
  • Bugsnagstars37 – Report errors with Bugsnag.
  • CouchDB Clientstars6 – Simple CouchDB client for Vapor.
  • CrudRouterstars47 – Automatic RESTful CRUD router generation for any Fluent Model.
  • CSRFstars31 – A package to add protection to Vapor against CSRF attacks.
  • CSV Frameworkstars26 – A simple framework to read and write CSV files.
  • Fernostars45 – Vapor Firebase Realtime database provider.
  • Flashstars34 – Flash messages between views.
  • FluentQuerystars148 – Build complex raw SQL queries while still using Swift keypaths.
  • Gatekeeperstars39 – Rate limiting middleware for Vapor.
  • Google Cloud Providerstars22 – Interact with Google Cloud Platform APIs from your Vapor project.
  • Guardianstars89 – Modern rate-limiting middleware.
  • Imperialstars109 – Federated Authentication with OAuth providers.
  • JWT Keychainstars35 – Easily scaffold a keychain using JWT for Vapor.
  • JWT Middlewarestars29 – Middleware to Authenticate and Authorize Requests in Vapor.
  • Leaf Error Middlewarestars44 – Serve up custom 404 and server error pages for your Vapor App.
  • Leaf Markdownstars49 – Markdown renderer for Vapor.
  • Lingo Vaporstars39 – Vapor provider for Lingo – the Swift localization library.
  • Local Storagestars3 – Storage driver using local filesystem.
  • MailCorestars77 – Sending e-mails via SMTP, MailGun and SendGrid.
  • Meowstars66 – An alternative codable ORM for MongoDB.
  • MongoKittenstars609 – MongoDB driver in Swift.
  • Paginationstars67 – Simple Vapor 3 Pagination.
  • Paginatorstars67 – Query pagination for Vapor and Fluent.
  • S3stars80 – Library for accessing the Amazon S3 service (and compatible) with support for most commonly used operations.
  • S3 Storagestars9 – Library for simple access to the Amazon S3 service.
  • Sanitizestars17 – Powerful model extraction from Vapor JSON requests.
  • SendGrid Providerstars57 – SendGrid-powered mail backend for Vapor.
  • SimpleFileLoggerstars13 – A simple file logging provider for Vapor.
  • Slugifystars15 – Convenience for sluggifying your strings.
  • Storagestars63 – Eases the use of multiple storage and CDN services.
  • Stripe Providerstars152 – Stripe Provider for Vapor.
  • Submissionsstars15 – Conveniences for creating forms and validating (form) submissions.
  • Sugarstars26 – A package of sugar for Vapor.
  • SwifQLstars250 – Easily build flexible and type-safe SQL with pure Swift.
  • SwiftyBeaver Providerstars31 – SwiftyBeaver Logging Provider for Vapor, the server-side Swift web framework.
  • Telesign Providerstars10 – A Telesign provider for Vapor.
  • Vapor Mailgun Servicestars83 – A service to be used with Vapor to send emails.
  • Vapor reCAPTCHAstars10 – Validate Google reCAPTCHAs using Vapor.
  • Vapor Request Storagestars7 – A replacement for request.storage which was available in Vapor 1 & 2.
  • Vapor Security Headersstars108 – Harden Your Security Headers For Vapor.
  • Vapor Test Toolsstars30 – Helper designed to make testing your endpoints in Vapor 3 pain-free.
  • VaporExtstars33 – A collection of Swift extensions for wide range of Vapor data types and classes.
  • WKHTMLTOPDFstars32 – Build PDF files from Leaf templates or web pages through the wkhtmltopdf CLI tool.
  • XMLCodingstars7 – XML encoder and decoder.

Tools

  • Etherstars82 – A Command-Line Interface for the Swift Package Manager.
  • Heroku buildpack: curl with HTTP/2 supportstars8
  • Icestars347 – A developer friendly package manager for Swift; 100% compatible with Swift Package Manager.
  • Sourcerystars6k – Meta-programming for Swift, stop writing boilerplate code.
  • Sublimatestars57 – Fast prototyping with synchronization and authentication based on Sourcery.
  • Swifterstars34 – A macOS tool to help you manage your Xcode projects and give you a quick access to DerivedData folder cleaning and management.

Services

  • Vapor Cloud
  • Vapor Red

Education

Articles

  • Deep Dive into Setup and Deployment for Heroku and Ubuntu
  • How to test controllers by mocking dependencies in Vapor 3 and Swift
  • Vapor 3 Tutorials – Big collection of small tutorials.
  • Transforming from Vapor 2 to Vapor 3 – Transitioning from Vapor 2 to Vapor 3 with a real world project.
  • Tutorials for Beginner to Advanced – Written tutorials for Beginner to Advanced.
  • Using the dependency injection framework for testing in Vapor 3 and Swift – How to use dependency injection framework which will help you manage dependencies and mock them inside your tests.
  • Watermarking photos with ImageMagick, Vapor 3 and Swift on macOS and Linux – Tutorial on how to use the ImageMagick library in Swift.
  • What’s new in Vapor 4?

Books

  • Server Side Swift with Vapor
  • Server-Side Swift (Vapor Edition)

Newsletters

  • VaporNation – Weekly Vapor newsletter with all things Vapor.

Videos

  • Server Side Swift with Vapor
  • Vapor - Beginner to Advanced

Open-source Projects

  • SteamPressstars338 – A Blogging Engine and Platform written in Swift for use with the Vapor Framework.
  • User Manager Servicestars68 – A small, useful user manager made for production application setups.
  • Swifttubestars162 – Curates iOS conference videos in one place.
